title: Update containers/image to v2.0.0, and buildah to v1.8.4
body:
This adds the the mirror-by-digest-only option to mirrors, and moves the search order to an independent list.

Also includes a ~unrelated bug fix in dealing with the affected c/image API.

AFAICS needs https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1634 to be merged first.

comments.body: @mtrmac Any movement on this PR?  Any closer to cutting a version of containers/image?

> @mtrmac Any closer to cutting a version of containers/image?

Updated https://github.com/containers/image/pull/617 to try to have at least _somewhat_ readable documentation.
DO NOT MERGE as is, this includes unmerged https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1634 . After that is merged, this should revendor from the upstream repo (or an upstream release) again.
@mtrmac buildah 1.8.4 release has been created can you rebase this against that so we can merge?
Revendored from released c/image v2.0.0 and buildah v1.8.4.
